# You Mail Engine

You Mail Engine is an educational platform providing simple, jargon-free email guides and tutorials.

## Core Purpose
- **Educational Email Guides**: Simplified articles explaining email basics, settings, and inbox features.
- **Privacy Awareness**: Information on safe email habits, account protection, and spam awareness.
- **Digital Literacy**: Practical learning for everyday users to master digital communication.

## Key Features
- **Beginner-Friendly**: Content written for non-technical users.
- **Privacy-Focused**: Dedicated sections for security tips and safe email practices.
- **Comprehensive FAQ**: Answers to common email-related questions.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS.
- **Routing**: React Router DOM.
- **Icons**: Lucide React.
- **SEO**: React Helmet Async.

## Directory Structure
- `/src/components`: UI components (Hero, FAQ, Security tips, etc.)
- `/src/pages`: Main application pages (Home, About, Guides, FAQ, etc.)
- `/src/policies`: Legal and privacy policy pages.
- `/public`: Static assets and SEO-related files (robots.txt, sitemap.xml).
